global_rules: All text must be legible and meet contrast ratios. Use text-shadow for glow, but do not make it blurry.
Borders must be 1px solid, sharp edges (rounded-none).
Include data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based) on all interactive elements.
Do not use card components with soft shadows or border-radius. Use flat, rectangular, terminal-like panes.
Use uppercase for labels, overlines, and buttons with wide tracking (tracking-widest).

typography.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-display uppercase tracking-widest text-[#00FF41] drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,255,65,0.6)]
typography.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-primary uppercase tracking-wider text-[#00FF41]
typography.label: text-xs font-primary uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#008F11]

surfaces_and_components.panel: bg-[#050a05] border border-[#00FF41]/30 p-4 relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[linear-gradient(rgba(18,16,16,0)_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.25)_50%),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,0,0,0.06),rgba(0,255,0,0.02),rgba(0,0,255,0.06))] before:bg-[length:100%_4px,3px_100%] before:pointer-events-none
surfaces_and_components.button_primary: bg-transparent border border-[#00FF41] text-[#00FF41] px-6 py-2 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold hover:bg-[#00FF41] hover:text-black hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,65,0.6)] transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2
surfaces_and_components.button_danger: bg-transparent border border-[#FF003C] text-[#FF003C] px-6 py-2 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold hover:bg-[#FF003C] hover:text-black hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,60,0.6)] transition-all duration-200
surfaces_and_components.input_field: bg-black/50 border border-[#00FF41]/30 text-[#00FF41] px-4 py-2 font-secondary focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00FF41] focus:shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,65,0.3)] placeholder:text-[#005A0B] w-full rounded-none
surfaces_and_components.table_header: border-b border-[#00FF41]/50 text-[#008F11] uppercase tracking-wider pb-2
surfaces_and_components.badge_critical: bg-[#FF003C]/20 text-[#FF003C] border border-[#FF003C]/50 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs uppercase
surfaces_and_components.badge_high: bg-[#FFB000]/20 text-[#FFB000] border border-[#FFB000]/50 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs uppercase
surfaces_and_components.terminal_output: bg-black p-4 font-secondary text-sm text-[#00FF41] h-64 overflow-y-auto border border-[#00FF41]/20 custom-scrollbar

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 h-full p-4
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense. Use p-4 for panels, gap-4 for grids. Everything should feel compact and functional.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: MANDATORY overlay on main panels. pointer-events-none, repeating-linear-gradient to simulate CRT monitor.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use CSS drop-shadow on headings and active buttons. Avoid heavy blur on text to maintain legibility.
visual_enhancers.blinking_cursor: Simulate a terminal cursor `_` at the end of active inputs or loading terminal lines with an infinite blink animation.
visual_enhancers.ascii_art: Use ASCII art for the main logo or empty states.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Instant hard transitions for colors, subtle glow expansion.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Matrix digital rain effect or simple ASCII spinner (|, /, -, \).
motion_and_interactions.terminal_typing: New lines in the terminal should appear sequentially, simulating actual stdout.

icons.style: Sharp, angular icons. Size 16px or 20px. Color matches text.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use React + Tailwind CSS. Ensure you use .js/.jsx files as requested by the system (not .tsx).
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Avoid pre-built Shadcn components if they use rounded corners or soft shadows; customize them heavily to be sharp, flat, and neon-bordered if used.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: For the layout, implement a full-screen dashboard (h-screen, overflow-hidden on body) where panels scroll internally, resembling a real command center.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="start-scan-button"`).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: The AI Analysis Panel (Kimi K2) should stand out slightly by using the accent_ai color (#00F0FF) for borders and key text to contrast with the Matrix green.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Implement custom scrollbars in index.css: width 8px, background #050a05, thumb #00FF41, no rounded corners.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Add a global scanline overlay to the `body` or main wrapper to enforce the cyberpunk terminal aesthetic.
